seo.title: Terms and Conditions | San Roku Ku
seo.description: Terms governing use of the San Roku Ku website, services, digital products, and content.

title: Terms and Conditions
intro: These terms govern your use of the San Roku Ku website and any services, digital products, or content we provide. By accessing our site or placing an order for services, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: 1. General
items: Our site and materials are provided for professional and informational use.
We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the site means you accept the revised terms.
All services are subject to availability and acceptance of your order.

sections.heading: 2. Intellectual Property
items: All films, images, text, designs, branding, and website content are owned by San Roku Ku or used with permission. You may not copy, distribute, reproduce, modify, or publicly display any material without prior written consent.

For custom design services, final approved artwork remains the intellectual property of the client once full payment has been received. San Roku Ku reserves the right to display completed work in portfolios, promotional materials, and on our website unless otherwise agreed in writing.

sections.heading: 3. Service Scope
items: Service descriptions, package details, and revision limits are defined on the relevant service page at the time of purchase. Revision limits are strictly based on the package selected.
Additional revisions beyond the included package allowance may incur additional fees.

sections.heading: 4. Approvals, Client Response Time, and Project Inactivity
items: To ensure projects progress efficiently, clients are expected to review and respond to revision previews, approval requests, or information requests within a reasonable timeframe.
If feedback is not received within 72 hours after a revision preview has been delivered, San Roku Ku reserves the right to proceed with the project.

For services involving digital deliverables, if the client does not respond to preview, approval, or delivery communications within 7 working days, the order will be considered automatically approved and delivered.

Delivery is considered completed once files, download links, transfer links, or access credentials have been sent to the client using the contact information provided at the time of purchase or during the project.
Requests for additional revisions, changes, or updates after approval or automatic delivery may be treated as a new revision round, add-on service, or new order.

sections.heading: 5. Delivery Terms
items: Final files are delivered according to the specifications of the selected package. All files are considered final upon approval. Editable source files are included only in packages where explicitly stated or if purchased as an add-on.

sections.heading: 6. Client Responsibilities
items: Clients are responsible for ensuring they have the legal rights to all materials provided, including but not limited to film stills, images, footage, fonts, logos, music, and trademarks.
San Roku Ku is not liable for claims, damages, or legal issues arising from materials supplied by the client.

sections.heading: 7. Usage Rights
items: Upon full payment and final approval, clients receive full usage rights for their custom artwork across streaming platforms, film festivals, marketing campaigns, websites, and social media.

sections.heading: 8. Payment Terms
items: Full payment is required before work begins in order to secure your project within our production schedule.
All transactions are processed securely via third-party payment providers such as Stripe Checkout. San Roku Ku does not store, collect, or have access to your card or payment details.
Failure to complete payment will result in suspension or cancellation of services.

sections.heading: 9. Refund Policy
items: Because all poster design and streaming graphics services are custom created specifically for your film, refunds are not available once design or production work has begun.
Revision rounds are included according to your selected package to ensure satisfaction prior to final delivery.

sections.heading: 10. Limitation of Liability
items: To the fullest extent permitted by law, San Roku Ku is not liable for indirect or consequential loss, loss of profits, rejection by streaming platforms, delays caused by client response time, or data loss.
Where liability cannot be excluded by law, it is limited to the total amount paid for the relevant service.

sections.heading: 11. Governing Law
items: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Kingdom. Any disputes will be handled in the courts of England and Wales.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
items: For questions regarding these terms, please contact:
support@sanrokuku.com or newbusiness@sanrokuku.com
